subcodes.first_line: O thou who art thirsty for reality! Praise be to God that the light of guidance shone forth and the Court of the heart became illuminated.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه حقیقت الحمد لله که نور هدایت درخشید و ساحت دل روشن گردید این موهبت رب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a source of light; guidance, @development of capacity and readiness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual transformation
